purpose: Audit the fixed5 47-feature vocabulary and H11 evidence map against the Task 4-0 whole-system upper-observation role before redesigning scientific validation.
audit_principles: The unit of analysis is the whole-system G_t distribution and causal K_t history.
Features may summarize global geometry or global trajectory, but may not claim complete discovery of local structures.
H11 axes are descriptive semantic-geometric coordinates, not scenario labels, objectives, or safety judgements.
Fixed-grid approximations must remain visibly bounded proxies.
A feature that is constant on a calibration population must not be converted into artificial evidence by a scale-floor workaround.
Prediction and recovery semantics remain unavailable until their causal sub-contracts are frozen.

metadata_non_scoring.reason: Frozen five-axis compatibility metadata only; correctly excluded from scoring.

retain_bounded_proxy_with_existing_or_st.watchpoint: Compact concentration may represent collapse as well as efficient or coherent structure.
One-hop fixed-grid density proxy, not literal k-nearest-neighbour density.
Concentration proxy; not a local-attractor detector.
Fixed-grid boundary mass only; not a general statistical tail or direct danger signal.
Support-cell ratio rather than probability-mass-weighted anomaly rate.
Five marginal transport distances, not full joint five-dimensional transport.
Centroid-path proxy and undefined near zero-length motion without the registered floor.
Centroid sign-reversal proxy with noise and window sensitivity.

revise_or_withhold_from_scoring.current_issue: Connected active-support components under a very low relative activity threshold collapse smooth full-support distributions into one component and do not reliably represent whole-system multimodality.
revise_or_withhold_from_scoring.required_followup: Define and validate a density-level, persistence, watershed, or other scale-aware global mode proxy before scoring.

revise_or_withhold_from_scoring.current_issue: Depends on the current major-component extraction and therefore becomes a constant one-component value when mode_count collapses.
revise_or_withhold_from_scoring.required_followup: Recompute only after a valid global mode decomposition exists.

calibration_contract_audit.finding: The Task 1 contract requires zero-scale features to be marked non_scoring_constant and forbids synthesizing evidence. The old Task 4 calibration instead used a 1e-9 scale floor for constant active_axis_count, axis_redundancy, mode_count, and cluster_balance and left them scoreable.
calibration_contract_audit.scientific_effect: A tiny later deviation can become an extreme calibrated score, and a structurally constant proxy can incorrectly contribute to H11.
calibration_contract_audit.required_change: Calibration artifacts must explicitly mark per-fit non-scoring constants. Task 2 H11 construction and Task 3 independent validation must skip those features rather than applying a numeric scale floor as evidence.

Stability.reason: Whole-distribution motion and curvature coordinate; existing claim correctly states that it is not safety by itself.

AdaptabilityStar.reason: Whole-distribution mobility and reconfiguration proxy; existing limitation correctly avoids claiming successful adaptation.

issues: mode_count and cluster_balance are not currently reliable fixed-grid evidence
generic jsd_velocity and marginal wasserstein_velocity can increase during drift, contraction, or collapse and therefore should not automatically count as positive exploration
Exploration.required_change: Make global spread, axis participation, and validated mode structure primary; move or reduce generic movement evidence unless a separate directional rationale is demonstrated.

Efficiency.reason: Geometric compact-use proxy only; existing claim and maximum LIMITED status are appropriate.
Efficiency.minor_cleanup: raw_dimension is non-scoring metadata and need not remain a signed component reference.

Robustness.reason: The axis belongs to H11, but the fixed5 implementation correctly lacks sufficient causal recovery evidence.

issues: Diversity is compatible with whole-system observation
ModeSeparability currently depends on invalid or constant mode_count and cluster_balance proxies
StructuralDiversity.required_change: Keep the H11 axis and Diversity component; withhold ModeSeparability contribution until a validated global mode contract exists.

TrajectoryDynamics.reason: Whole-system causal trajectory composite is consistent with the Phase 1 compression result; sensitivity and redundancy remain Task 4 validation questions.

Predictability.reason: Correctly reserved; no motion substitute or future target may be used.

issues: tail_mass measures boundary occupancy, not internal compatibility
trajectory_curvature measures temporal path shape, not current internal compatibility
compactness can turn global collapse into apparent coherence
Coherence.required_change: Remove boundary and trajectory evidence from the direct Coherence score or move it to H12_C/H20 audit channels; retain explicit compact-collapse watchpoints and cap fixed5 Coherence at LIMITED until revalidated.

Recoverability.reason: Correctly reserved; return cannot be inferred from external shock labels or future outcomes.

issues: Usefulness or outcome quality is not observable from formal G_t/K_t alone
current positive mode evidence is not reliable
NoveltyQuality.required_change: Keep the H11 axis name for compatibility, preserve the structural-novelty-only claim, and withhold mode-dependent evidence until repaired.

evidence_map_cross_cutting_findings.finding: Equal averaging of all available positive and negative features changes axis meaning when some feature families are unavailable.
evidence_map_cross_cutting_findings.followup: New Task 4 must test axis identity under feature ablation and missing evidence.

evidence_map_cross_cutting_findings.finding: Exploration, StructuralDiversity, Efficiency, and NoveltyQuality share several spectral and mode features.
evidence_map_cross_cutting_findings.followup: Compare cross-axis correlation, effective rank, ablation survival, and reference-basis information loss.

evidence_map_cross_cutting_findings.finding: H11 alone cannot expose all boundary and compression failures.
evidence_map_cross_cutting_findings.followup: Task 4 design must include H12_C/H20/PCA8/Random8 where fixed5-compatible implementations exist, or explicitly record their absence.

change_scope: temporary LIMITED caps until new scientific validation
consume the revised registry and evidence map without changing canonical G_t/K_t boundaries
independently recompute revised axis mappings and status caps
add negative tests for forbidden scale-floor evidence synthesis

final_decision.next_task: Task4-1R targeted Task1 contract/evidence-map version update plus Task2/Task3 compliance patches
